CustomField.description: Shared HMAC secret used to sign and verify sync request payloads between this entity and the hub. When populated, outbound requests include an X-Signature header and inbound requests are verified against it.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 request signing. Both sides must use the same value. Treat as a credential.
CustomField.label: HMAC Secret
